description_long: This object is a collection of modern smart home electronics, including a variety of compact devices such as a square hub, a round sensor, a cylindrical camera or sensor, a wall-mounted outlet or switch, a rectangular sensor, and a small round puck. The devices are primarily white and gray, with some gold or brass accents, and feature clean, minimalist designs typical of contemporary smart home technology. The set includes both plug-in and standalone units, with visible ports, buttons, and indicator lights on some components. The materials appear to be mostly plastic with some metallic and glass elements, suggesting durability and a sleek finish. The objects are sized for tabletop or wall mounting, and are likely used for home automation, security, or environmental monitoring. The overall appearance is cohesive, suggesting they are part of a single product ecosystem.
description: A set of sleek, modern smart home electronics in white, gray, and gold, including hubs, sensors, and wall-mounted devices with minimalist designs.
description_view_0: Front view showing all devices lined up, highlighting their shapes and interface details.
description_view_1: Side view showing the depth and cylindrical profile of the tallest device, with others stacked behind.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs and ports of the devices, including wall-mounting features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, emphasizing the thickness and arrangement of the devices.
